scripts.changelog: cd .. && { echo '---'; echo 'title: Changelog'; echo 'layout: changelog'; echo 'hideInstall: true'; echo 'translationKey: changelog'; echo '---'; sed -e '1{/^# Changelog$/d;}' -e 's|compare/v[0-9.]*\.\.\.v\([0-9.]*\)|releases/tag/v\1|g' CHANGELOG.md; } > website/content/changelog.md && for lang in ca es sv; do cp website/content/changelog.md website/content/$lang/changelog.md; done
scripts.assets: bun run css:build && bun run changelog
